name: techwerker
description: Unofficial local Codex helper for first-time Tech Week setup, event filtering, signup queues, repeated RSVP fields, and RSVP state.

interface.shortDescription: Set up Tech Week filters and RSVP queues
interface.longDescription: Unofficial local Codex helper for Tech Week attendees. First-time setup asks for New York, Boston, or San Francisco, stores reusable non-secret RSVP basics such as name, email, phone, company, role, country, and LinkedIn, then captures city-specific filter preferences for topics, neighborhoods, event types, and start times. It keeps persistent state under ~/.codex/data/tech-week, builds geography-aware oversignup portfolios, tracks RSVP state, and uses assisted browser filling while pausing before final submit by default. Not affiliated with Tech Week, a16z, Partiful, or event hosts.
defaultPrompt: Set up Techwerker for first-time use
Set up Techwerker for New York
Build my NY Tech Week portfolio
Work through my Techwerker RSVP queue
Make a Tech Week day plan from accepted events
